title: JA Movie Poster Design
tagline: Your film deserves a poster that makes people stop and watch.
description: JA. We design cinematic posters specifically for independent films, streaming platforms, and film festivals. We understand how posters need to communicate tone, genre, and emotion instantly. Every poster is crafted to capture attention, build credibility, and help your film stand out in crowded marketplaces, festivals, and streaming services.
bannerTitle: Professional Movie Posters Designed by Filmmakers
longer-description: We design cinematic posters specifically for independent films, streaming releases, and film festivals. Unlike generic design platforms, San Roku Ku is an active production company with real filmmaking experience. We understand each film’s requirements, streaming platform standards, and how posters appear as thumbnails where the decision to watch is made in seconds. Every poster is crafted to communicate your film’s tone, attract attention, and help your project compete with professional releases. This is poster design built for filmmakers who want their work to stand out and be taken seriously.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, structured workflow from order to final delivery.

steps.title: Place your order
steps.description: Choose your package and submit your details. During checkout you will be asked to provide your title, credits, images, references, and creative direction.

steps.title: Review and approve revisions
steps.description: You will receive your first draft within the agreed timeframe. You may request revisions according to the number included in your selected package.

steps.title: Final delivery
steps.description: Once approved, you will receive your final high-resolution delivery files, ready for print and digital use.

qa.question: In what format will I receive the files?
qa.answer: All packages include high-resolution JPG files ready for streaming platforms, film festivals, and social media. Premium also includes layered editable source files (PSD). Source files can be added to Basic or Standard if needed.

qa.question: How long does it take?
qa.answer: Basic and Standard approximately 4–5 days. Premium: approximately 2–3 days. Express delivery (24-hour turnaround) is available if you have an urgent deadline.

qa.question: Approval Window
qa.answer: If we do not receive feedback within 48 hours after a revision is sent for approval, the order will be automatically marked as delivered and approved.

qa.question: Delivery Terms
qa.answer: All delivery files are considered final upon approval. Final files are provided in high resolution according to the package specifications.

qa.question: How many revisions are included?
qa.answer: Basic includes 1 revision, Standard includes 2 revisions, and Premium includes up to 5 revisions. Our goal is to ensure your poster looks exactly right and is ready for release.

qa.question: Are editable source files included?
qa.answer: Premium includes editable source files (PSD). These can also be added to Basic or Standard if you would like full flexibility for future edits.

qa.question: Do I receive full usage rights?
qa.answer: Yes. Once the final design is delivered and approved, you receive full usage rights for your poster across streaming platforms, film festivals, marketing, websites, and social media.

qa.question: What do you need from me to begin?
qa.answer: Please provide your film title, images or stills, genre, tone, tagline (if available), and any references you like. If you are unsure, we can guide you through the process.

qa.question: Can you design a poster if I only have still frames?
qa.answer: Yes. Most independent filmmakers provide still frames from their film. We can create a professional cinematic poster using those images.

qa.question: What if I am not sure which package to choose?
qa.answer: You can contact us at newbusiness@sanrokuku.com and we will recommend the best option based on your film and goals.

qa.question: How does payment work?
qa.answer: Full payment is required before work begins to secure your project in our production schedule. All transactions are processed securely through Stripe Checkout. We do not store, collect, or have access to your card or payment details.

qa.question: What is your refund policy?
qa.answer: Because each poster is custom designed specifically for your film, refunds are not available once design work has begun. However, revisions are included in your package to ensure you are happy with the final result.

title: Filmhub Graphics Design
tagline: Professional Filmhub and streaming graphics designed to make your film look professional and ready for distribution.
description: Filmhub and streaming platforms require multiple artwork formats with specific sizes and layouts. Incorrect graphics can lead to rejection, delays, or your film looking unprofessional in the catalog. We prepare and optimize your graphics to meet Filmhub requirements and ensure your film presents correctly across streaming platforms. This includes properly formatted key art, thumbnails, banners, and platform-ready versions designed to improve visibility and attract viewers.
bannerTitle: Filmhub-Ready Graphics Designed for Streaming Platforms
longer-description: We create compliant, professional graphics formatted specifically for Filmhub and digital streaming platforms. Incorrect artwork can lead to rejection, delays, or poor visibility. We handle all required sizes, ratios, and platform-ready formats so your film presents correctly, looks professional, and stands out in crowded catalogs. Our goal is to ensure your film is ready for distribution and positioned to attract viewers.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, structured workflow from order to final delivery.

steps.title: Place your order
steps.description: Choose your package and submit your details. During checkout you will be asked to provide your title, credits, images, references, and creative direction.

steps.title: Review and approve revisions
steps.description: You will receive your first draft within the agreed timeframe. You may request revisions according to the number included in your selected package.

steps.title: Final delivery
steps.description: Once approved, you will receive your final high-resolution delivery files, ready for print and digital use.

qa.question: What is included in the Filmhub Graphics service?
qa.answer: We resize and optimize your poster artwork to meet Filmhub and streaming platform requirements. Depending on your package, this includes vertical key art, banners, square versions, thumbnails, and platform-ready formats designed to ensure compliance and improve visibility.

qa.question: In what format will I receive the files?
qa.answer: Final files are delivered in high-quality JPG format, fully optimized for Filmhub and streaming platforms. Editable source files (PSD) are included in Premium or available as an add-on.

qa.question: How long does it take?
qa.answer: Basic and Standard orders are typically completed within 3–5 days after receiving your assets. Premium orders are prioritized and delivered within 2–3 days. Express delivery is available if needed.

qa.question: Approval Window
qa.answer: If we do not receive feedback within 48 hours after a revision is sent for approval, the order will be automatically marked as delivered and approved.

qa.question: Delivery Terms
qa.answer: All delivery files are considered final upon approval. Final files are provided in high resolution according to the package specifications.

qa.question: How many revisions are included?
qa.answer: Basic includes 1 revision, Standard includes up to 2 revisions, and Premium includes up to 5 revisions. We work with you to ensure everything is correct and ready for submission.

qa.question: Can you design a poster if I don't have one?
qa.answer: Yes. Full poster design from scratch is included in the Premium package. Basic and Standard focus on optimizing and formatting existing artwork.

qa.question: Will my graphics meet Filmhub requirements?
qa.answer: Yes. All graphics are prepared to meet Filmhub specifications and streaming platform standards, ensuring your film is ready for submission and professional presentation.

qa.question: Do I receive full usage rights?
qa.answer: Yes. Once complete, you receive full usage rights for distribution platforms, marketing, and promotional use.

qa.question: What do you need from me?
qa.answer: Please provide your existing poster or artwork, film title, and any platform requirements if known. If you are unsure, we can guide you.

qa.question: How do I place an order?
qa.answer: Click the Order Filmhub Graphics button and submit your project details. You can also contact us at newbusiness@sanrokuku.com if you have questions.

qa.question: How does payment work?
qa.answer: Full payment is required before work begins to secure your project in our production schedule. All transactions are processed securely through Stripe Checkout. We do not store, collect, or have access to your card or payment details.

qa.question: What is your refund policy?
qa.answer: Because all work is custom created for your film, refunds are not available once production begins. Revisions are included to ensure your graphics meet your expectations.
